qa_pairs.question: What type of courses are included in this list?
qa_pairs.answer: This list includes self-paced (or self-directed) courses developed by our technical staff.

qa_pairs.question: When can I take these courses and at what pace?
qa_pairs.answer: The courses can be taken at any time, and you can proceed at your own pace.

qa_pairs.question: What are the requirements for successfully completing a course?
qa_pairs.answer: Successful completion requires finishing quizzes and/or assignments.

qa_pairs.question: What do I receive once I successfully complete a course?
qa_pairs.answer: Upon successful completion, you will receive a Certificate of Completion for the course.

qa_pairs.question: How is the list of available courses organized?
qa_pairs.answer: The list of courses is sorted alphabetically.

qa_pairs.question: Do all courses require an Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: No, some courses require an Alliance account, but not all of them.

qa_pairs.question: Which organization created the Bioinformatics course?
qa_pairs.answer: The Bioinformatics course was created by SHARCNET.

qa_pairs.question: How many hours is the Bioinformatics course expected to take?
qa_pairs.answer: The Bioinformatics course is expected to take 2 hours.

qa_pairs.question: Is an Alliance account necessary for the Bioinformatics course?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, an Alliance account is required for the Bioinformatics course.

qa_pairs.question: What is the estimated duration for the Introduction to GPU Programming course?
qa_pairs.answer: The Introduction to GPU Programming course has an estimated duration of 3-4 hours.

qa_pairs.question: Does the Introduction to GPU Programming course offer a Certificate of Completion?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the Introduction to GPU Programming course offers a Certificate of Completion.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the creator of the Introduction to Machine Learning course?
qa_pairs.answer: The Introduction to Machine Learning course was created by SHARCNET.

qa_pairs.question: Is an Alliance account required to take the Introduction to Machine Learning course?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, an Alliance account is required for the Introduction to Machine Learning course.

qa_pairs.question: What organization developed the Introduction to Trillium course?
qa_pairs.answer: The Introduction to Trillium course was developed by SciNet.

qa_pairs.question: How long is the Introduction to Trillium course?
qa_pairs.answer: The Introduction to Trillium course is 4 hours long.

qa_pairs.question: Is an Alliance account required for the Introduction to Trillium course?
qa_pairs.answer: No, an Alliance account is not required for the Introduction to Trillium course, though it is recommended.

qa_pairs.question: What is the estimated time commitment for the Introduction to SciNet, Niagara, and Mist course?
qa_pairs.answer: The estimated time commitment for the Introduction to SciNet, Niagara, and Mist course is 1 hour.

qa_pairs.question: Does completing the Introduction to SciNet, Niagara, and Mist course grant a Certificate of Completion?
qa_pairs.answer: No, completing the Introduction to SciNet, Niagara, and Mist course counts towards an HPC certificate instead of a standard Certificate of Completion.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the creator of the GIT Version control course?
qa_pairs.answer: The GIT Version control course was created by SciNet.

qa_pairs.question: Is an Alliance account mandatory for the GIT Version control course?
qa_pairs.answer: No, an Alliance account is not mandatory for the GIT Version control course; however, it is recommended.

qa_pairs.question: How many hours are required for the Introduction to SQL course?
qa_pairs.answer: The Introduction to SQL course requires 3-4 hours.

qa_pairs.question: Does the Introduction to Supercomputing course require an Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the Introduction to Supercomputing course requires an Alliance account.

qa_pairs.question: What is the duration of the Introduction to Supercomputing course?
qa_pairs.answer: The Introduction to Supercomputing course has a duration of 10-15 hours.

qa_pairs.question: Who developed the Introduction to the Shell course?
qa_pairs.answer: The Introduction to the Shell course was developed by SHARCNET.

qa_pairs.question: How many hours does the Introduction to the Shell course take?
qa_pairs.answer: The Introduction to the Shell course takes 8 hours.

qa_pairs.question: What is the duration of the Mastering GPU Efficiency course?
qa_pairs.answer: The Mastering GPU Efficiency course has a duration of 1 hour.

qa_pairs.question: Does the Mastering the Alliance job scheduler course provide a Certificate of Completion?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the Mastering the Alliance job scheduler course provides a Certificate of Completion.

qa_pairs.question: What is the estimated time for the New User Course?
qa_pairs.answer: The New User Course has an estimated time of 1 hour.

qa_pairs.question: Which listed courses were developed by SciNet?
qa_pairs.answer: The courses developed by SciNet are 'Introduction to Trillium', 'Introduction to SciNet, Niagara, and Mist', and 'GIT Version control'.

qa_pairs.question: Which courses do not strictly require an Alliance account, but recommend one?
qa_pairs.answer: The courses that do not strictly require an Alliance account, but recommend one, are 'Introduction to Trillium', 'Introduction to SciNet, Niagara, and Mist', and 'GIT Version control'.

qa_pairs.question: What are the shortest courses offered by SHARCNET in terms of duration?
qa_pairs.answer: The shortest courses offered by SHARCNET are 'Mastering GPU Efficiency' and 'New User Course', both estimated at 1 hour.

qa_pairs.question: Are all the courses in the list offered in English?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, all the courses in the list are offered in English (EN).

qa_pairs.question: Which course has the longest estimated completion time?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Introduction to Supercomputing' course has the longest estimated completion time, at 10-15 hours.
